summary: Completed P0 remediation phases 1-7 in full. Phase 1-3: RLS runtime, auth hardening, Decimal precision. Phase 4-7: test split (app.test.ts 3.7k lines → domain-specific integration tests), Playwright E2E stubs, infra stubs (KMS, storage, queue, PDF/A validator), route authorization matrix with Zod schema and coverage test, ADR 0067 for AppUser.email global unique.
limitations: PR #57 pending merge (protected branch requires status check).
Playwright E2E tests are stubs only — full E2E flows require running web/portal dev servers.
Infra stubs are dev-only; production requires real implementations.
Route matrix coverage test uses printRoutes() parser — may need refinement if Fastify output format changes.
next_steps: Merge PR #57 after CI gates pass.
Merge PR #56 (phases 1-3) first if not yet merged.
Set up Playwright browsers (`pnpm exec playwright install`).
Implement production KMS, storage, queue, PDF/A validator providers.
Enforce route matrix at runtime (Fastify preHandler hook).
instruction_for_next_agent: Read AGENTS.md, harness/STATUS.md, and this handoff before modifying code. Verify branch state with git status -sb. Check PR #56 and #57 status. If resuming, ensure Playwright browsers are installed before running test:e2e.
